pe_method.notes: AAPL own NTM P/E ~31-33x confirmed; used 31.5x. FY2025E EPS = $7.26 (18.8% growth from FY2024 $6.08)

ev_ebitda_method.notes: AAPL 3yr avg EV/EBITDA FY2022-FY2024 ~24x; slightly below current ~26x TTM to avoid circularity

notes: Triangulated value = average of P/E value ($228.69) and EV/EBITDA value ($205.48)
